name: yandex-mail-mcp-desktop
description: MCP server for Yandex Mail — Claude Desktop (stdio)

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --minify --platform=node --target=node18 --outfile=dist/yandex-mail-mcp.js --format=cjs --banner:js="#!/usr/bin/env node" --external:node-notifier && esbuild src/cli-trust.ts --bundle --minify --platform=node --target=node18 --outfile=dist/cli-trust.js --format=cjs --banner:js="#!/usr/bin/env node"
scripts.test: node scripts/check-canonical-mirror.js && node scripts/check-handler-loc.cjs && esbuild src/__tests__/sanitize.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/__tests__/sanitize.test.js --external:node:test --external:node:assert && esbuild src/__tests__/auth.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/__tests__/auth.test.js --external:node:test --external:node:assert && esbuild src/__tests__/tools-registry.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/__tests__/tools-registry.test.js --external:node:test --external:node:assert && esbuild src/__tests__/confirm.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/__tests__/confirm.test.js --external:node:test --external:node:assert && esbuild src/__tests__/state-dir.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/__tests__/state-dir.test.js --external:node:test --external:node:assert && esbuild src/__tests__/allowlist.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/__tests__/allowlist.test.js --external:node:test --external:node:assert && esbuild src/__tests__/cli-trust.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/__tests__/cli-trust.test.js --external:node:test --external:node:assert && esbuild src/__tests__/audit.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/__tests__/audit.test.js --external:node:test --external:node:assert && esbuild src/__tests__/guards.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/__tests__/guards.test.js --external:node:test --external:node:assert && esbuild src/__tests__/token-perm.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=cjs
